kinesisanalytics.application.inputproces: Provides a description of a processor that is used to preprocess the records in the stream before being processed by your application code. Currently, the only input processor available is [AWS Lambda](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/).

kinesisanalytics.application.inputproces.Description: The [InputLambdaProcessor](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-kinesisanalytics-application-inputlambdaprocessor.html) that is used to preprocess the records in the stream before being processed by your application code.
